# CWE-656: Reliance on Security Through Obscurity (mitigated, pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-656-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"encoding/json"
	"net/http"
)

type ConfigEntry struct {
	Key   string `json:"key"`
	Value string `json:"value"`
}

var configEntries = []ConfigEntry{{Key: "debug", Value: "true"}}

// Safe: configuration access requires authenticated admin authorization.
func HiddenConfigPanel(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	if r.Header.Get("X-User-Role") != "admin" {
		http.Error(w, "forbidden", http.StatusForbidden)
		return
	}
	w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
	_ = json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(configEntries)
}
